---
title: "Fuzzy Matching Diagnostics"
format:
  html: default
  pdf: default
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
helper <- if (file.exists("analysis/_analysis_helpers.R")) "analysis/_analysis_helpers.R" else "../_analysis_helpers.R"
source(helper)
```

This notebook preserves the diagnostic parts of legacy Chunk 16: the final string-distance methods and thresholds, troublesome name-pair checks, active join-status counts, and candidate-pair coverage.

```{r summary, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
analysis_table(read_analysis_csv("diagnostics", "extended", "fuzzy_matching", "fuzzy_matching_summary.csv"), "Fuzzy matching diagnostic summary")
```

```{r methods, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
analysis_table(read_analysis_csv("diagnostics", "extended", "fuzzy_matching", "fuzzy_matching_legacy_methods.csv"), "Legacy final string-distance methods and thresholds")
```

```{r legacy-tuning, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
analysis_table(read_analysis_csv("diagnostics", "extended", "fuzzy_matching", "fuzzy_matching_legacy_tuning_reference.csv"), "Legacy tuning comments retained as benchmarks")
```

```{r pair-coverage, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
analysis_table(read_analysis_csv("diagnostics", "extended", "fuzzy_matching", "fuzzy_matching_candidate_pair_coverage.csv"), "Candidate-pair coverage")
```

```{r troublesome, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
analysis_table(read_analysis_csv("diagnostics", "extended", "fuzzy_matching", "fuzzy_matching_troublesome_pairs.csv"), "Troublesome legacy name-pair checks")
```

```{r join-status, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
analysis_table(read_analysis_csv("diagnostics", "extended", "fuzzy_matching", "fuzzy_matching_join_status_counts.csv"), "Current join status counts")
```
